items.title: EIP-7892: Blob Parameter Only Hardforks
items.description: Defines BPO hardforks - a lightweight mechanism for incrementally scaling blob capacity through targeted hard forks that modify only blob-related parameters (target, max, baseFeeUpdateFraction).

items.title: EIP-7917: Deterministic Proposer Lookahead
items.description: Pre-calculates and stores a deterministic proposer_lookahead in the beacon state at the start of every epoch for MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD + 1 epochs. Fixes next-epoch proposer schedule non-determinism and enables based preconfirmation protocols.
